value_chain_position: Global payment network operator; owns the rails (VisaNet) connecting ~15,000 issuers to ~100M merchant locations, taking a per-transaction toll on every card-based payment globally.
relative_comps: Visa is the canonical fintech rails chokepoint: 49% FCF margin on $43B revenue with a duopoly network effect that no new entrant has broken at scale. It is the largest name in the chunk by market cap ($623B) and by any FCF metric. Growth of 11% CAGR / 14% YoY is strong for a company this size. Visa trades at a material premium to Mastercard (~30x FCF vs. ~25x) reflecting its larger float and global lead; both are in broadening (not steep ramp) as card penetration in developed markets matures while emerging-market and digital-wallet volumes layer on growth.
